name: Striped Kids' Floor Cushion Throw Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Spruce up the aesthetic of your kid's room with this Striped Floor Cushion Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This floor cushion features a polyester twill exterior with soft polyurethane foam filling for padded comfort that’s perfect for sitting and relaxing. Showcasing a square silhouette, the floor cushion showcases a blue and black striped pattern with button accent in the middle for added flair — providing a charming seating option that creates a casual atmosphere while adding a dash of style to your kiddo's sleeping quarter.
